ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.description:
GP-TEMPEST is a time-aware variational autoencoder for molecular dynamics
simulations. It places a Matérn Gaussian Process prior on the latent
trajectories, exploiting temporal correlations to recover kinetically
relevant coordinates — even hidden ones invisible in any low-dimensional
projection of the data.
about.summary: Gaussian Process Temporal Embedding for Protein Simulations and Transitions

about.description:
GP-TEMPEST is a time-aware variational autoencoder for molecular dynamics
simulations. It places a Matérn Gaussian Process prior on the latent
trajectories, exploiting temporal correlations to recover kinetically
relevant coordinates — even hidden ones invisible in any low-dimensional
projection of the data.
about.summary: Gaussian Process Temporal Embedding for Protein Simulations and Transitions

name: gp-tempest
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "gp-tempest" %}
{% set version = "0.1.2" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/{{ name[0] }}/{{ name }}/gp_tempest-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 6989c0933fe1d6a19637a2e04b4a3e20a9126eef55c48cd009190dae39f29a7d

build:
  noarch: python
  number: 0
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation
  entry_points:
    - tempest = gptempest.main:main

requirements:
  host:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip
    - setuptools >=64
    - wheel
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}
    - pytorch >=2.0.0
    - scikit-learn >=1.0.0
    - numpy >=1.21.0
    - matplotlib-base >=3.4.0
    - prettypyplot >=0.10.0
    - pyyaml >=6.0
    - click >=8.0.0
    - tqdm >=4.60.0

test:
  imports:
    - gptempest
  commands:
    - pip check
    - tempest --help
  requires:
    - pip
    - python {{ python_min }}

about:
  home: https://github.com/moldyn/GP-TEMPEST
  summary: Gaussian Process Temporal Embedding for Protein Simulations and Transitions
  description: |
    GP-TEMPEST is a time-aware variational autoencoder for molecular dynamics
    simulations. It places a Matérn Gaussian Process prior on the latent
    trajectories, exploiting temporal correlations to recover kinetically
    relevant coordinates — even hidden ones invisible in any low-dimensional
    projection of the data.
  license: MIT
  license_file: LICENSE
  doc_url: https://moldyn.github.io/GP-TEMPEST
  dev_url: https://github.com/moldyn/GP-TEMPEST

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - gegabo
